# st-alicloud_flink_namespace (Resource)

Manages the Compute Unit (CU) Specs for an existing Alicloud Flink (foasconsole) Namespace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "st-alicloud_flink_namespace" "namespace" {
  instance_id = "f_intl-sg-xxxxxxxxxxx"
  namespace   = "test-default"
  ha          = false

  guaranteed_resource_spec = {
    cpu       = 0
    memory_gb = 0
  }

  elastic_resource_spec = {
    cpu       = 10
    memory_gb = 40
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ha` (Boolean) High availability (HA) flag.
- `instance_id` (String) The Instance ID (Workspace ID) of the Flink project.
- `namespace` (String) The name of the namespace.

### Optional

- `elastic_resource_spec` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--elastic_resource_spec))
- `guaranteed_resource_spec` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--guaranteed_resource_spec))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--elastic_resource_spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `elastic_resource_spec`

Required:

- `cpu` (Number)
- `memory_gb` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--guaranteed_resource_spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `guaranteed_resource_spec`

Required:

- `cpu` (Number)
- `memory_gb` (Number)

## Import

Flink namespace can be imported using the instance_id and namespace, e.g.

```terraform
terraform import st-alicloud_flink_namespace.namespace <instance_id>:<namespace>
```
